text:
Salt and freshly ground black pepper

Put the wild garlic leaves. Mustard and looml rapeseed oil into a blender and process as smoothly or as coarsely as you wish. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Add as much of the extra oil as you need to get the desired consistency.


Roast Chicken with New Season's Garlic Sauce
Serves 3-4
1 free-range chicken, about l.5kg, with livers sea salt and freshly ground black pepper a few sprigs each of thyme and rosemary, a few generous knobs of butter

For the stuffing
60g butter
1 medium onion , peeled and finely chopped
